test_cases.description: notify() returns a ChallengeHandle with correct deadline and scope when all preconditions are met
test_cases.input_description: Valid AuthorizationRequest with Tier3Access payload, future expiry, non-empty scope, valid endpoint config
test_cases.expected_output_description: ChallengeHandle with matching deadline, event_id, challenge_id, and original_scope

test_cases.description: notify() works for AnomalyEscalation variant with all severity levels
test_cases.input_description: Valid AuthorizationRequest with AnomalyEscalation payload, Critical severity

test_cases.description: notify() returns endpoint_unavailable when no valid endpoint config exists
test_cases.input_description: Valid request but endpoint config is None/missing
assertions: NotifyError with EndpointUnavailable variant is raised

test_cases.description: notify() returns circuit_breaker_open when endpoint circuit breaker is Open
test_cases.input_description: Valid request but circuit breaker in Open state with no half-open probe due
assertions: NotifyError with CircuitBreakerOpen variant is raised

test_cases.description: notify() returns expired_request when expires_at is in the past
test_cases.input_description: AuthorizationRequest with expires_at set to a past timestamp
assertions: NotifyError with ChallengeExpired variant is raised

test_cases.description: notify() returns configuration_error for non-HTTPS URL
test_cases.input_description: Endpoint config with http:// URL instead of https://
assertions: NotifyError with ConfigurationError variant is raised

test_cases.description: notify() returns internal_error on unexpected channel creation failure
test_cases.input_description: Valid request but internal channel creation is mocked to fail
assertions: NotifyError with InternalError variant is raised

test_cases.description: resolve() returns Approved AuthorizationDecision when user responds with Approve
test_cases.input_description: ChallengeHandle whose oneshot channel receives an Approve response before deadline
test_cases.expected_output_description: AuthorizationDecision with Approve variant, correct challenge_id, event_id, decided_at, no denial_reason

test_cases.description: resolve() returns Denied AuthorizationDecision with ExplicitDeny when user responds with Deny
test_cases.input_description: ChallengeHandle whose oneshot channel receives a Deny response with reason
test_cases.expected_output_description: AuthorizationDecision with Deny variant and ExplicitDeny reason

test_cases.description: resolve() returns Modified AuthorizationDecision with validated adjusted_scope
test_cases.input_description: ChallengeHandle with scope [A,B,C]; user responds Modify with scope [A,B]
test_cases.expected_output_description: AuthorizationDecision with Modify variant and adjusted_scope [A,B]
assertions: decision.adjusted_scope is a strict subset of original_scope
decision.adjusted_scope matches the user's proposed scope

test_cases.description: resolve() returns Denied with Timeout when deadline expires before response
test_cases.input_description: ChallengeHandle with deadline in the past (simulated expired)

test_cases.description: resolve() returns Denied with DeliveryFailure when sender is dropped
test_cases.input_description: ChallengeHandle whose oneshot sender has been dropped

test_cases.description: resolve() removes the challenge from ChallengeRegistry after resolution
test_cases.input_description: ChallengeHandle that receives a response
test_cases.expected_output_description: Challenge no longer in registry after resolve returns
assertions: Challenge is removed from registry after resolution

test_cases.description: handle_callback() processes valid Approve callback and unblocks resolve()
test_cases.input_description: Valid challenge_id, valid PASETO token, Approve response
test_cases.expected_output_description: No error; the corresponding ChallengeHandle resolves with Approve

test_cases.description: handle_callback() processes valid Modify callback with valid subset scope
test_cases.input_description: Valid challenge_id, valid PASETO token, Modify response with strict subset scope
test_cases.expected_output_description: No error; the corresponding ChallengeHandle resolves with Modify
assertions: adjusted_scope is strict subset of original

test_cases.description: handle_callback() returns challenge_not_found for unknown challenge_id
test_cases.input_description: challenge_id that does not exist in registry
assertions: NotifyError with ChallengeNotFound variant is raised

test_cases.description: handle_callback() returns challenge_expired for expired challenge
test_cases.input_description: challenge_id for a challenge whose deadline has passed
assertions: NotifyError with ChallengeExpired variant is raised

test_cases.description: handle_callback() returns challenge_already_resolved on duplicate callback
test_cases.input_description: challenge_id that was already resolved by a prior callback
assertions: NotifyError with ChallengeAlreadyResolved variant is raised

test_cases.description: handle_callback() returns invalid_token for bad PASETO token
test_cases.input_description: Valid challenge_id but garbled/invalid challenge_token
assertions: NotifyError with InvalidCallbackToken variant is raised

test_cases.description: handle_callback() returns invalid_response for malformed AuthorizationResponse
test_cases.input_description: Valid token but response has unknown fields or invalid variant
assertions: NotifyError with InvalidResponse variant is raised

test_cases.description: handle_callback() returns scope_escalation when Modify scope is not a strict subset
test_cases.input_description: Modify response with adjusted_scope equal to or superset of original_scope
assertions: NotifyError with ScopeEscalation variant is raised

test_cases.description: verify_webhook_signature() returns True for correctly signed payload
test_cases.input_description: Headers and body signed with current_secret using HMAC-SHA256

test_cases.description: verify_webhook_signature() returns True when payload is signed with previous_secret during rotation
test_cases.input_description: Headers signed with previous_secret, endpoint has both current and previous secrets

test_cases.description: verify_webhook_signature() returns False for wrong secret
test_cases.input_description: Headers signed with a different secret than either current or previous

test_cases.description: verify_webhook_signature() returns False for timestamp beyond ±5 minute tolerance
test_cases.input_description: Valid signature but webhook_timestamp is 10 minutes in the past
test_cases.expected_output_description: Returns False even though signature is valid

test_cases.description: verify_webhook_signature() errors on malformed signature header
test_cases.input_description: webhook_signature header missing v1 prefix or has invalid base64
assertions: NotifyError with InvalidSignature variant is raised

test_cases.description: verify_webhook_signature() errors when no valid secrets configured
test_cases.input_description: Endpoint config with empty/invalid secret key_bytes
assertions: NotifyError with ConfigurationError variant is raised

test_cases.description: sign_webhook_payload() produces valid signature headers
test_cases.input_description: Valid JSON body and 32-byte WebhookSecret
test_cases.expected_output_description: WebhookSignatureHeaders with fresh DeliveryId, current timestamp, v1-prefixed base64 signature

test_cases.description: sign_webhook_payload output is verifiable by verify_webhook_signature
test_cases.input_description: Sign a body then verify the resulting headers against same secret

test_cases.description: sign_webhook_payload() errors when secret key_bytes is less than 32 bytes
test_cases.input_description: WebhookSecret with 16-byte key
assertions: Error is raised for insufficient key length

test_cases.description: deliver_webhook() returns successful DeliveryReport with one attempt on first-try success
test_cases.input_description: Valid payload, mock endpoint returns 200 on first attempt

test_cases.description: deliver_webhook() retries and succeeds after transient failures
test_cases.input_description: Mock endpoint fails first 2 attempts then succeeds
assertions: First two attempts have non-Success outcome

test_cases.description: deliver_webhook() returns DeliveryFailed when all retries exhausted
test_cases.input_description: Mock endpoint always returns 500, max_retries=3

test_cases.description: deliver_webhook() stops retrying when deadline is reached
test_cases.input_description: Mock endpoint always fails, deadline is very close to now
test_cases.expected_output_description: Delivery stops at deadline, does not exceed it

test_cases.description: deliver_webhook() errors immediately when circuit breaker is Open
test_cases.input_description: Endpoint with circuit breaker in Open state
assertions: NotifyError with CircuitBreakerOpen variant is raised

test_cases.description: Each delivery attempt uses a unique DeliveryId
test_cases.input_description: Multiple retry attempts
test_cases.expected_output_description: All DeliveryIds in attempts list are unique

test_cases.description: create_challenge_token() returns a valid PASETO v4.local token
test_cases.input_description: Valid challenge_id, future expires_at, 32-byte symmetric key

test_cases.description: create_challenge_token() errors when key is not exactly 32 bytes
test_cases.input_description: 16-byte symmetric key
assertions: Error is raised for wrong key length

test_cases.description: verify_challenge_token() returns correct ChallengeId for valid token
test_cases.input_description: Token created by create_challenge_token with matching challenge_id and key

test_cases.description: create→verify challenge token round-trip succeeds
test_cases.input_description: Create token then verify with same key and challenge_id
test_cases.expected_output_description: Verification succeeds and returns correct ChallengeId

test_cases.description: verify_challenge_token() errors on invalid/garbled token
test_cases.input_description: Garbled token string
assertions: NotifyError with InvalidCallbackToken variant is raised

test_cases.description: verify_challenge_token() errors when key doesn't match
test_cases.input_description: Token created with key A, verified with key B
assertions: NotifyError with InvalidCallbackToken variant is raised

test_cases.description: verify_challenge_token() errors when token has expired
test_cases.input_description: Token created with past expires_at (simulated)

test_cases.description: verify_challenge_token() errors when expected_challenge_id doesn't match token's
test_cases.input_description: Token for challenge_id A, verified with expected challenge_id B

test_cases.description: validate_scope_subset() returns True for strict subset
test_cases.input_description: original=[A,B,C], adjusted=[A,B]

test_cases.description: validate_scope_subset() returns False for equal sets (not strictly less)
test_cases.input_description: original=[A,B], adjusted=[A,B]
assertions: Returns False — equal sets are not a strict subset

test_cases.description: validate_scope_subset() returns False when adjusted is a superset
test_cases.input_description: original=[A,B], adjusted=[A,B,C]

test_cases.description: validate_scope_subset() returns False when adjusted has entries not in original
test_cases.input_description: original=[A,B], adjusted=[C]

test_cases.description: validate_scope_subset() returns True for single entry from multi-entry original
test_cases.input_description: original=[A,B,C], adjusted=[B]

test_cases.description: register_challenge() returns ChallengeHandle and registers in registry
test_cases.input_description: Unique challenge_id, future deadline, non-empty scope
test_cases.expected_output_description: ChallengeHandle with matching fields, registry incremented

test_cases.description: register_challenge() errors on duplicate challenge_id
test_cases.input_description: challenge_id already registered

test_cases.description: cleanup_expired_challenges() removes expired challenges and returns count
test_cases.input_description: Registry has 3 challenges: 2 expired, 1 active

test_cases.description: cleanup_expired_challenges() does not remove challenges with future deadlines
test_cases.input_description: Registry has 2 challenges both with future deadlines, now is before both

test_cases.description: get_registry_snapshot() returns accurate diagnostic info without secrets
test_cases.input_description: Registry with 5 active challenges, 3 resolved, 2 cleaned up

test_cases.description: get_endpoint_health() returns health with correct circuit state
test_cases.input_description: Endpoint with known delivery history
test_cases.expected_output_description: EndpointHealth with correct counters and circuit state

test_cases.description: rotate_webhook_secret() moves current to previous and installs new
test_cases.input_description: Endpoint with current_secret key_id='k1', new_secret key_id='k2'

test_cases.description: rotate_webhook_secret() errors when new key_id matches current
test_cases.input_description: new_secret.key_id same as current_secret.key_id

test_cases.description: rotate_webhook_secret() errors when new secret key_bytes < 32 bytes
test_cases.input_description: new_secret with 16-byte key

test_cases.description: After rotation, both old and new secrets are valid for signature verification
test_cases.input_description: Rotate secret, then verify signatures made with either old or new secret
assertions: Verify with new (current) secret returns True
Verify with old (previous) secret returns True

test_cases.description: INVARIANT: Pipeline timeout = deny. Any ChallengeHandle reaching deadline resolves as Denied with Timeout
test_cases.input_description: Create challenge, let deadline expire, resolve handle
test_cases.expected_output_description: Denied with DenialReason::Timeout, never Approved or Modified

test_cases.description: INVARIANT: AnomalyEscalation must produce auditable AuthorizationDecision even on timeout
test_cases.input_description: Create AnomalyEscalation challenge, let it timeout
test_cases.expected_output_description: Explicit Denied decision with full provenance fields

test_cases.description: INVARIANT: Modify response with non-strict-subset scope is rejected with ScopeEscalation
test_cases.input_description: Callback with Modify response where adjusted_scope equals original_scope
assertions: NotifyError with ScopeEscalation variant is raised

test_cases.description: INVARIANT: Modify response with superset scope is rejected
test_cases.input_description: Callback with Modify response where adjusted_scope has entries not in original
assertions: NotifyError with ScopeEscalation variant is raised

test_cases.description: INVARIANT: Webhook endpoints must use HTTPS. HTTP URLs are rejected.
test_cases.input_description: EndpointConfig with url='http://example.com/webhook'

test_cases.description: INVARIANT: Only v1 HMAC-SHA256 signatures accepted; other version prefixes rejected
test_cases.input_description: webhook_signature with 'v2,' prefix
assertions: Error raised for unsupported signature version

test_cases.description: INVARIANT: Error messages must not contain key material
test_cases.input_description: Trigger various crypto errors and inspect error messages
test_cases.expected_output_description: No hex/base64 key material in error strings
assertions: Error string does not contain key bytes
Error string does not contain base64 key

test_cases.description: INVARIANT: Signature verification uses same code path regardless of which byte differs
test_cases.input_description: Two signatures: one differing at first byte, one at last byte
test_cases.expected_output_description: Both return False (no early exit observable)

test_cases.description: State machine: Challenge transitions from Registered to Resolved via callback
test_cases.input_description: Register challenge, send callback with Approve, resolve handle
test_cases.expected_output_description: Clean transition, challenge removed from registry

test_cases.description: State machine: Challenge transitions from Registered to Expired via cleanup
test_cases.input_description: Register challenge with short deadline, wait past deadline, run cleanup
assertions: Subsequent resolve returns Denied with DeliveryFailure

test_cases.description: State machine: Second callback to already-resolved challenge is rejected
test_cases.input_description: Register challenge, send Approve callback, send second Approve callback

test_cases.description: When cleanup drops the sender, corresponding resolve returns Denied with DeliveryFailure
test_cases.input_description: Register challenge, run cleanup after deadline, then resolve handle

test_cases.description: Retry delays follow exponential backoff pattern bounded by max_delay
test_cases.input_description: RetryPolicy with initial_delay=1s, backoff_factor=2.0, max_delay=30s, multiple failures
test_cases.expected_output_description: Delays between attempts increase exponentially up to max_delay

test_cases.description: Circuit breaker transitions from Closed to Open after threshold consecutive failures
test_cases.input_description: Endpoint with circuit_breaker_threshold=3, mock always fails
assertions: Subsequent delivery attempt gets CircuitBreakerOpen error

test_cases.description: ChallengeId, DeliveryId, and EventId are distinct types and cannot be mixed
test_cases.input_description: Pass an EventId value where ChallengeId is expected

test_cases.description: Edge case: resolution at exactly the deadline instant
test_cases.input_description: ChallengeHandle with deadline set to exactly 'now'
assertions: Decision is Denied with Timeout at exact boundary
